summary: Comprehensive unit tests (45+ tests) covering all major requirements: JUnit XML/JSON parsing, aggregation, flaky test detection, markdown generation, workflow structure validation, and integration via fixtures. Good organization with inline and file-based fixtures. However, integration testing is limited—run_tests.py only tests one scenario through act (full matrix) when the task explicitly requests testing "each test case" separately; missing edge cases like error elements in XML, special characters in names, empty fields, very large inputs, and malformed data. No negative/boundary tests. Workflow structure tests are basic. run_tests.py is brittle (string matching on output) and could be better modularized. Would catch most regressions in happy path but would miss edge case failures.
